notes: SEASONAL. 1 adult OR 1 child free per pass. Valid for all public walking tours; not for private tours, water-based tours, or Beacon Hill with a BOO!/Footloose on the Freedom Trail. No passes available at this time.
raw: 617-367-2345 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 1 adult or 1 child for free. Visit www.bostonbyfoot.org to browse Boston By Foot's extensive public tour calendar. Passes are valid for all public walking tours; they are not valid for private tours, water-based tours, or annual celebration tours ( Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail ). No passes are available at this time.
